title: Cyclogramma neoauriculata
taxonomy: Cyclogramma neoauriculata is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes ferns. This plant belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, a group of ferns characterized by their simple leaves. Cyclogramma neoauriculata is further classified as a genus and species within the family Thelypteridaceae. The exact classification of Cyclogramma neoauriculata includes the rank of kingdom, division, class, order, family, genus, and species. Its classification at the kingdom level is Plantae.

intro:
There is limited information on Cyclogramma neoauriculata. However, based on available knowledge, here's a paragraph about this plant:

Cyclogramma neoauriculata is a type of plant species that is used in traditional medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Cyclogramma neoauriculata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyclogramma neoauriculata is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
